style.styleSentence: A high-energy alternative rock K-pop fusion track at 148 BPM featuring tightly edited saturated guitars with precise double-tracking, a polished drum sound layered with samples and controlled room ambience, focused side-chained synth bass for clean low-end, and a glossy modern vocal mix that emphasizes intimate details on the passionate female lead while delivering expressive male rap-sung sections within densely stacked harmonies.
style.vocalStyle: Passionate female lead with wide emotional range and dynamic swells, mixed with clear enunciation on expressive male rap-sung sections.
